title: Smooth Operator
description: A straightforward modpack built to achieve the highest frame rates with minimal lag.
body:
### Smooth Operator - An awful first try.

Welcome!
This is my **first** modpack, so don't expect perfection.

This modpack is designed with one primary objective: raw performance, for the potatoest of potatos.
I've handpicked some mods (duh?) and fine-tuned them to squeeze the last drops of performance out of the lemon, with minimal-ish resource usage.

What you can / can not expect:
- Instead of a mind-bogglingly beautiful install, this cuts down on all the 'wow's and makes your game look worse than the Xbox 360 edition
- Classic Minecraft feel with the Programmer Art texture pack to (hopefully) put a lighter load on your computer



- Do not expect an instant 999% performance boost. The entire pack is yet to be tested; I am open for reviews!
- I genuinely have no idea what to write anymore i am sleep deprived pls send rio punch flavor Monster.

I've compared this modpack to Simply Optimized; here are the results.

_Simply Optimized_
![SO](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2736b0bff5801a325bd6af85caafea8e24670cce.png)

_Smooth Operator_
![SO (lol)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a2e7a486492521e102ce5220bee7801a48a92c69.png)

Settings in both of the screenshots have been set to bare minimum, I've provided the world saves along the modpack.


Specs used:
1. GPU: Gigabyte Nvidia RTX 2060
2. CPU: Intel i3-10105f
3. RAM: 16GB DDR4 @ 2133MHz (stupid cpu won't let me enable xmp)


Join the journey, share your feedback, and help make this project even better. Thanks for giving this a try. Enjoy the ride!

p.s: DO NOT TRY INSTALLING RUSHERHACK OR ANY CLIENT FOR THAT MATTER IT WILL NOT WORK HELP ME AAAAAAAA
